THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELEON FRANCO, JUAN ELIAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WARD, WILLIAM MICHAEL PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THERE IS CONFLICTING TESTIMONY ABOUT WHETHER DEFENDANT HIT PLAINTIFF'S MONOCYCLE, BUT DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY IS CORROBORATED BY THE PHOTOGRAPHS OF DEFENDANT'S CAR SHOWING NO DAMAGE TO THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
